name: English Sweet and Sour Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim excess fat from the short ribs.
2. Combine flour, seasoned salt, and pepper; dredge the ribs in this mixture.
3. Brown the ribs in oil on all sides in a Dutch oven.
4. Remove the meat from the pan.
5. Add onions and cook until golden brown.
6. Place the ribs on top of the onions.
7. Combine water, dark brown sugar, catsup, vinegar, garlic, and bay leaves; pour over the ribs.
8. Cover and bake in a moderate oven (350 degrees F.) for 2 1/2 hours.
9. Remove bay leaves before serving.
